dict.string: Configures DDM OS Reminder message preferences
The human-readable description of this payload. This description appears on the Detail screen.
The human-readable name for the profile payload. The name appears on the Detail screen and doesn't need to be unique.
Mac Admins’ new favorite, MDM-agnostic, “set-it-and-forget-it” end-user messaging for Apple’s Declarative Device Management-enforced macOS update deadlines

The reverse-DNS-style identifier for the payload. This identifier is usually the same as the 'TopLevel' value, with an additional appended component. This string must be unique within the profile. During a profile replacement, the system updates payloads with the same 'PayloadIdentifier' and 'PayloadUUID' in the old and new profiles.
A reverse-DNS-style identifier for the specific payload. It is usually the same identifier as the root-level PayloadIdentifier value with an additional component appended.
The payload type, which each payload domain's reference page specifies.

The globally unique identifier for the payload. The actual content is unimportant, but must be globally unique. In macOS, use 'uuidgen' to generate UUIDs. During a profile replacement, the system updates payloads with the same 'PayloadIdentifier' and 'PayloadUUID' in the old and new profiles.
A globally unique identifier for the payload. The actual content is unimportant, but it must be globally unique.
The version of this specific payload.
The version number of the individual payload.
The human-readable string containing the name of the organization that provides the profile. This value doesn't need to match the organization payload value in the enclosing dictionary.
Path to the log file for the DDM reminder script.
Number of days before the deadline when reminders start being displayed.
Number of days before the deadline when blur-screen enforcement starts.
Number of days before the deadline when the secondary button is hidden.
Days Before Deadline: Hide Defer Button
Number of days of excessive uptime before warning the user.
Number of minutes after a user interaction during which baseline reminders are suppressed.
Interval in days for periodic reminders before the regular display window begins.
Controls restart workflow behavior after deadline. Valid values: Off | Prompt | Force.
Number of days past deadline before activating restart workflow behavior.
Minimum uptime in minutes required before the past-deadline restart workflow is eligible to run.
Countdown duration in seconds shown by the past-deadline Force restart workflow.
Delay in seconds before redisplaying the past-deadline Force restart dialog.
Percent of free disk space required before warning the user.
Whether to disable the secondary button instead of hiding it when deferral is no longer allowed.
Disable Secondary Button Instead of Hide
Delay in minutes before enforcing reminders around meetings.
Comma-separated local reminder times in 24-hour HH:MM format used by the heartbeat scheduler.
Comma-separated minute thresholds before the effective enforcement deadline when final reminders are displayed.
Hours past the effective deadline before aggressive reminder mode starts.
Minutes between reminders while aggressive past-deadline mode is active.
Space-delimited list of application name substrings used to allowlist display sleep assertions; matching assertions defer reminders up to the Meeting Delay.
URL to the organization overlay icon image.
URL to the organization overlay icon image used when the interface is in Dark Mode. Falls back to OrganizationOverlayIconURL when unset.
Whether to swap the overlay icon and primary logo positions.
strftime format string used to render the deadline date for users.
Localized French override for deadline date format (human readable).
Localized French — Canada override for deadline date format (human readable).
Localized English — United Kingdom override for deadline date format (human readable).
Deadline Date Format (Human Readable) (English — United Kingdom)
Localized Japanese override for deadline date format (human readable).
Display name of the support team.
When enabled, hide the support phone row and blank the corresponding placeholder.
When enabled, hide the support email row and blank the corresponding placeholder.
When enabled, hide the support website row and blank the corresponding placeholder.
When enabled, hide the support knowledge base row and blank the corresponding placeholders.
URL opened when the info button is clicked.
Markdown-formatted link to the support knowledge base article.
Sample For assistance, please contact **{supportTeamName}** by clicking the (?) button in the bottom, right-hand corner.
Optional support sentence appended to message body.
When enabled, suppress the support assistance sentence in the main dialog body.
Sample For assistance, please contact **{supportTeamName}** by clicking the (?) button in the bottom, right-hand corner.
Localized support assistance message for English.
Sample Bei Fragen kontaktiere **{supportTeamName}** über die (?) Schaltfläche unten rechts.
Localized support assistance message for German.
Sample Pour obtenir de l'aide, contactez **{supportTeamName}** via le bouton (?) en bas à droite.
Localized support assistance message for French.
Sample Para obtener ayuda, contacte con **{supportTeamName}** haciendo clic en el botón (?) de la esquina inferior derecha.
Localized support assistance message for Spanish.
Sample Para obter assistência, contacte a equipa **{supportTeamName}** clicando no botão (?) no canto inferior direito.
Localized support assistance message for Portuguese.
Sample サポートが必要な場合は、右下の (?) ボタンをクリックして **{supportTeamName}** にお問い合わせください。
Localized support assistance message for Japanese.
Sample Voor hulp kunt u contact opnemen met **{supportTeamName}** door op de (?) knop rechtsonder in de hoek te klikken.
Localized support assistance message for Dutch.
Sample Per assistenza, contatta **{supportTeamName}** facendo clic sul pulsante (?) nell'angolo in basso a destra.
Localized support assistance message for Italian.
Language code to force for dialog content. Use auto to detect the logged-in user language.
Title text displayed at the top of the DDM dialog.
Localized title text displayed at the top of the ddm dialog. for English.
Localized title text displayed at the top of the ddm dialog. for German.
Localized title text displayed at the top of the ddm dialog. for French.
Localized title text displayed at the top of the ddm dialog. for Spanish.
Localized title text displayed at the top of the ddm dialog. for Portuguese.
Localized title text displayed at the top of the ddm dialog. for Japanese.
Localized title text displayed at the top of the ddm dialog. for Dutch.
Localized title text displayed at the top of the ddm dialog. for Italian.
Label for the primary action button.
Localized label for the primary action button. for English.
Localized label for the primary action button. for German.
Sample Ouvrir Mise à jour de logiciels
Localized label for the primary action button. for French.
Localized label for the primary action button. for Spanish.
Localized label for the primary action button. for Portuguese.
Sample ソフトウェア・アップデートを開く
Localized label for the primary action button. for Japanese.
Localized label for the primary action button. for Dutch.
Localized label for the primary action button. for Italian.
Label for the secondary (remind later) button.
Localized label for the secondary (remind later) button. for English.
Localized label for the secondary (remind later) button. for German.
Localized label for the secondary (remind later) button. for French.
Localized label for the secondary (remind later) button. for Spanish.
Localized label for the secondary (remind later) button. for Portuguese.
Localized label for the secondary (remind later) button. for Japanese.
Localized label for the secondary (remind later) button. for Dutch.
Localized label for the secondary (remind later) button. for Italian.
Localized label for the info button. for English.
Sample macOS auf dem Mac aktualisieren
Localized label for the info button. for German.
Sample Mettre à jour macOS sur Mac
Localized label for the info button. for French.
Sample Actualizar macOS en el Mac
Localized label for the info button. for Spanish.
Localized label for the info button. for Portuguese.
Sample MacでmacOSをアップデート
Localized label for the info button. for Japanese.
Sample Werk macOS bij op Mac
Localized label for the info button. for Dutch.
Localized label for the info button. for Italian.
Sample **Note:** Your Mac has been powered-on for **{uptimeHumanReadable}**. For more reliable results, please manually restart your Mac before proceeding.
Markdown-formatted text displayed in the dialog.
Sample **Note:** Your Mac has been powered-on for **{uptimeHumanReadable}**. For more reliable results, please manually restart your Mac before proceeding.
Localized markdown-formatted warning shown when system uptime exceeds the configured threshold. for English.
Sample **Hinweis:** Dein Mac läuft seit **{uptimeHumanReadable}**. Starte ihn für zuverlässigere Ergebnisse bitte manuell neu.
Localized markdown-formatted warning shown when system uptime exceeds the configured threshold. for German.
Sample **Note :** Votre Mac est allumé depuis **{uptimeHumanReadable}**. Redémarrez-le manuellement pour de meilleurs résultats.
Localized markdown-formatted warning shown when system uptime exceeds the configured threshold. for French.
Sample **Nota:** Su Mac lleva **{uptimeHumanReadable}** encendido. Para obtener resultados más fiables, reinícielo manualmente antes de continuar.
Localized markdown-formatted warning shown when system uptime exceeds the configured threshold. for Spanish.
Sample **Nota:** O seu Mac está ligado há **{uptimeHumanReadable}**. Para resultados mais fiáveis, reinicie-o manualmente antes de continuar.
Localized markdown-formatted warning shown when system uptime exceeds the configured threshold. for Portuguese.
Sample **注意:** このMacは **{uptimeHumanReadable}** の間、再起動されていません。より確実に実行するため、続行前に手動で再起動してください。
Localized markdown-formatted warning shown when system uptime exceeds the configured threshold. for Japanese.
Sample **Opmerking:** Uw Mac is al **{uptimeHumanReadable}** ingeschakeld. Voor betrouwbaardere resultaten wordt aanbevolen uw Mac handmatig opnieuw op te starten voordat u verdergaat.
Localized markdown-formatted warning shown when system uptime exceeds the configured threshold. for Dutch.
Sample **Nota:** Il tuo Mac è acceso da **{uptimeHumanReadable}**. Per risultati più affidabili, riavvia manualmente il Mac prima di procedere.
Localized markdown-formatted warning shown when system uptime exceeds the configured threshold. for Italian.
Sample **Note:** Your Mac has only **{diskSpaceHumanReadable}**, which may prevent this macOS {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower}.
Markdown-formatted text displayed in the dialog.
Sample **Note:** Your Mac has only **{diskSpaceHumanReadable}**, which may prevent this macOS {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower}.
Localized markdown-formatted warning shown when free disk space falls below the configured threshold. for English.
Sample **Hinweis:** Dein Mac hat nur **{diskSpaceHumanReadable}** frei. Dadurch kann dieses macOS-{titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade} scheitern.
Localized markdown-formatted warning shown when free disk space falls below the configured threshold. for German.
Sample **Note :** Votre Mac ne dispose que de **{diskSpaceHumanReadable}**, ce qui peut empêcher cette {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} macOS.
Localized markdown-formatted warning shown when free disk space falls below the configured threshold. for French.
Sample **Nota:** Su Mac solo dispone de **{diskSpaceHumanReadable}**, lo que puede impedir esta {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} de macOS.
Localized markdown-formatted warning shown when free disk space falls below the configured threshold. for Spanish.
Sample **Nota:** O seu Mac tem apenas **{diskSpaceHumanReadable}** livres, o que pode impedir esta {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} do macOS.
Localized markdown-formatted warning shown when free disk space falls below the configured threshold. for Portuguese.
Sample **注意:** このMacの空き容量は **{diskSpaceHumanReadable}** しかないため、このmacOS {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} を実行できない可能性があります。
Localized markdown-formatted warning shown when free disk space falls below the configured threshold. for Japanese.
Sample **Opmerking:** Uw Mac heeft slechts **{diskSpaceHumanReadable}** beschikbaar, wat deze macOS {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} kan verhinderen.
Localized markdown-formatted warning shown when free disk space falls below the configured threshold. for Dutch.
Sample **Nota:** Il tuo Mac ha solo **{diskSpaceHumanReadable}** disponibili, il che potrebbe impedire questo {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} di macOS.
Localized markdown-formatted warning shown when free disk space falls below the configured threshold. for Italian.
Sample **Good news!** The macOS {ddmVersionString} update has already been downloaded to your Mac and is ready to install. Installation will proceed quickly when you click **{button1text}**.
Markdown-formatted message displayed when the update is fully staged (downloaded and ready).
Sample **Good news!** The macOS {ddmVersionString} update has already been downloaded to your Mac and is ready to install. Installation will proceed quickly when you click **{button1text}**.
Localized markdown-formatted message displayed when the update is fully staged. for English.

Sample **Gute Nachricht!** Das macOS-{ddmVersionString}-Update wurde bereits auf deinen Mac geladen und ist bereit zur Installation. Die Installation geht schneller, wenn du auf **{button1text}** klickst.
Localized markdown-formatted message displayed when the update is fully staged. for German.
Sample **Bonne nouvelle !** La mise à jour macOS {ddmVersionString} est déjà téléchargée. L'installation démarrera rapidement après avoir cliqué sur **{button1text}**.
Localized markdown-formatted message displayed when the update is fully staged. for French.

Sample **¡Buenas noticias!** La actualización de macOS {ddmVersionString} ya se ha descargado en su Mac y está lista para instalarse. La instalación será más rápida cuando haga clic en **{button1text}**.
Localized markdown-formatted message displayed when the update is fully staged. for Spanish.
Sample **Boas notícias!** A atualização do macOS {ddmVersionString} já foi descarregada para o seu Mac e está pronta para instalar. A instalação será mais rápida quando clicar em **{button1text}**.
Localized markdown-formatted message displayed when the update is fully staged. for Portuguese.
Sample **お知らせ:** macOS {ddmVersionString} アップデートはすでにこのMacにダウンロードされており、インストールの準備ができています。**{button1text}** をクリックすると、すばやくインストールできます。
Localized markdown-formatted message displayed when the update is fully staged. for Japanese.
Sample **Goed nieuws!** De macOS {ddmVersionString}-update is al gedownload op uw Mac en is klaar om te worden geïnstalleerd. De installatie verloopt snel zodra u op **{button1text}** klikt.
Localized markdown-formatted message displayed when the update is fully staged. for Dutch.

Sample **Buone notizie!** L'aggiornamento di macOS {ddmVersionString} è già stato scaricato sul tuo Mac ed è pronto per l'installazione. L'installazione procederà rapidamente quando fai clic su **{button1text}**.
Localized markdown-formatted message displayed when the update is fully staged. for Italian.
Sample Your Mac has begun downloading and preparing required macOS update components. Installation will be quicker once all assets have finished staging.
Markdown-formatted message displayed when the update is partially staged (preparing).
Sample Your Mac has begun downloading and preparing required macOS update components. Installation will be quicker once all assets have finished staging.
Localized markdown-formatted message displayed when the update is partially staged. for English.
Sample Dein Mac lädt bereits erforderliche macOS-Update-Komponenten herunter und bereitet sie vor. Die Installation wird schneller, sobald alle Inhalte bereitstehen.
Localized markdown-formatted message displayed when the update is partially staged. for German.
Sample Votre Mac a commencé à télécharger et à préparer les composants requis de mise à jour macOS. L'installation sera ensuite plus rapide.
Localized markdown-formatted message displayed when the update is partially staged. for French.
Sample Su Mac ha comenzado a descargar y preparar los componentes necesarios de actualización de macOS. La instalación será más rápida cuando finalice la preparación de todos los recursos.
Localized markdown-formatted message displayed when the update is partially staged. for Spanish.
Sample O seu Mac começou a descarregar e a preparar os componentes necessários da atualização do macOS. A instalação será mais rápida quando todos os recursos estiverem preparados.
Localized markdown-formatted message displayed when the update is partially staged. for Portuguese.
Sample このMacでは、必要なmacOSアップデートコンポーネントのダウンロードと準備が進行中です。すべての項目の準備が完了すると、インストールはより短時間で完了します。
Localized markdown-formatted message displayed when the update is partially staged. for Japanese.
Sample Uw Mac is begonnen met het downloaden en voorbereiden van de vereiste macOS-updateonderdelen. De installatie zal sneller verlopen zodra alle onderdelen volledig zijn voorbereid.
Localized markdown-formatted message displayed when the update is partially staged. for Dutch.
Sample Il tuo Mac ha iniziato a scaricare e preparare i componenti necessari per l'aggiornamento di macOS. L'installazione sarà più rapida una volta completata la preparazione di tutti i componenti.
Localized markdown-formatted message displayed when the update is partially staged. for Italian.
Sample Your Mac will begin downloading the update shortly.
Markdown-formatted message displayed when the update download is pending.
Sample Your Mac will begin downloading the update shortly.
Localized markdown-formatted message displayed when the update download is pending. for English.
Sample Dein Mac beginnt in Kürze mit dem Download des Updates.
Localized markdown-formatted message displayed when the update download is pending. for German.
Sample Votre Mac commencera bientôt à télécharger la mise à jour.
Localized markdown-formatted message displayed when the update download is pending. for French.
Sample Su Mac comenzará a descargar la actualización en breve.
Localized markdown-formatted message displayed when the update download is pending. for Spanish.
Sample O seu Mac irá começar a descarregar a atualização em breve.
Localized markdown-formatted message displayed when the update download is pending. for Portuguese.
Sample このMacはまもなくアップデートのダウンロードを開始します。
Localized markdown-formatted message displayed when the update download is pending. for Japanese.
Sample Uw Mac zal binnenkort beginnen met het downloaden van de update.
Localized markdown-formatted message displayed when the update download is pending. for Dutch.
Sample Il tuo Mac inizierà a scaricare l'aggiornamento a breve.
Localized markdown-formatted message displayed when the update download is pending. for Italian.
Whether to hide staged update information (e.g., staged/partial/pending messages) in the UI.
Relative deadline phrase used when enforcement occurs on the current day.
Localized relative deadline phrase used when enforcement occurs on the current day. for English.
Localized relative deadline phrase used when enforcement occurs on the current day. for German.
Localized relative deadline phrase used when enforcement occurs on the current day. for French.
Localized relative deadline phrase used when enforcement occurs on the current day. for Spanish.

Localized relative deadline phrase used when enforcement occurs on the current day. for Japanese.
Localized relative deadline phrase used when enforcement occurs on the current day. for Dutch.
Localized relative deadline phrase used when enforcement occurs on the current day. for Italian.
Relative deadline phrase used when enforcement occurs on the following day.
Localized relative deadline phrase used when enforcement occurs on the following day. for English.
Localized relative deadline phrase used when enforcement occurs on the following day. for German.

Localized relative deadline phrase used when enforcement occurs on the following day. for Italian.

Localized localized word used when the enforced action is an upgrade. for Italian.

Label shown for free disk space in the info box.
Info Box Label: Free Disk Space
Localized label shown for free disk space in the info box. for English.
Info Box Label: Free Disk Space (English)
Localized label shown for free disk space in the info box. for German.
Info Box Label: Free Disk Space (German)

Info Box Label: Free Disk Space (Italian)
However, your Mac **will automatically restart and {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower}** on **{deadlineDisplay}** if you have not {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower}d before the deadline.
Sentence appended to the main message when the deadline renders as a full date.
However, your Mac **will automatically restart and {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower}** on **{deadlineDisplay}** if you have not {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower}d before the deadline.
Localized sentence appended to the main message when the deadline renders as a full date. for English.
Andernfalls **wird dein Mac am {deadlineDisplay} automatisch neu gestartet, um das erforderliche macOS-{titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade} zu installieren**.
Localized sentence appended to the main message when the deadline renders as a full date. for German.
Sinon, votre Mac **redémarrera automatiquement et appliquera la {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower}** le **{deadlineDisplay}**.
Localized sentence appended to the main message when the deadline renders as a full date. for French.
De lo contrario, su Mac **se reiniciará automáticamente y aplicará la {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower}** el **{deadlineDisplay}**.
Localized sentence appended to the main message when the deadline renders as a full date. for Spanish.
Caso contrario, o seu Mac **reiniciará automaticamente e aplicará a {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower}** em **{deadlineDisplay}**.
Localized sentence appended to the main message when the deadline renders as a full date. for Portuguese.
期限の **{deadlineDisplay}** までに実行されない場合、Macは**自動的に再起動して {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} を適用**します。
Localized sentence appended to the main message when the deadline renders as a full date. for Japanese.
Anders wordt uw Mac **automatisch opnieuw opgestart en wordt de {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} uitgevoerd** op **{deadlineDisplay}**.
Localized sentence appended to the main message when the deadline renders as a full date. for Dutch.

Tuttavia, il tuo Mac **si riavvierà automaticamente ed eseguirà l'{titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower}** il **{deadlineDisplay}** se non hai completato l'{titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} entro la scadenza.
Localized sentence appended to the main message when the deadline renders as a full date. for Italian.
However, your Mac **will automatically restart and {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower}** **{deadlineDisplay}** if you have not {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower}d before the deadline.
Sentence appended to the main message when the deadline renders as Today or Tomorrow.
However, your Mac **will automatically restart and {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower}** **{deadlineDisplay}** if you have not {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower}d before the deadline.
Localized sentence appended to the main message when the deadline renders as today or tomorrow. for English.
Andernfalls **wird dein Mac {deadlineDisplay} automatisch neu gestartet, um das erforderliche macOS-{titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade} zu installieren**.
Localized sentence appended to the main message when the deadline renders as today or tomorrow. for German.
Sinon, votre Mac **redémarrera automatiquement et appliquera la {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower}** **{deadlineDisplay}**.
Localized sentence appended to the main message when the deadline renders as today or tomorrow. for French.
De lo contrario, su Mac **se reiniciará automáticamente y aplicará la {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower}** **{deadlineDisplay}**.
Localized sentence appended to the main message when the deadline renders as today or tomorrow. for Spanish.
Caso contrario, o seu Mac **reiniciará automaticamente e aplicará a {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower}** **{deadlineDisplay}**.
Localized sentence appended to the main message when the deadline renders as today or tomorrow. for Portuguese.
期限の **{deadlineDisplay}** までに実行されない場合、Macは**自動的に再起動して {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} を適用**します。
Localized sentence appended to the main message when the deadline renders as today or tomorrow. for Japanese.
Anders wordt uw Mac **automatisch opnieuw opgestart en wordt de {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} uitgevoerd** **{deadlineDisplay}**.
Localized sentence appended to the main message when the deadline renders as today or tomorrow. for Dutch.

Tuttavia, il tuo Mac **si riavvierà automaticamente ed eseguirà l'{titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower}** **{deadlineDisplay}** se non hai completato l'{titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} entro la scadenza.
Localized sentence appended to the main message when the deadline renders as today or tomorrow. for Italian.
Title displayed for a configured final-minute pre-deadline reminder.
Localized English override for pre-deadline threshold title.
Localized German override for pre-deadline threshold title.
Localized French override for pre-deadline threshold title.
Sample Fecha límite de {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade} de macOS inminente
Localized Spanish override for pre-deadline threshold title.
Sample Prazo da {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade} do macOS iminente
Localized Portuguese override for pre-deadline threshold title.
Sample macOSの{titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade}期限が近づいています
Localized Japanese override for pre-deadline threshold title.
Localized Dutch override for pre-deadline threshold title.
Sample Scadenza per {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade} di macOS imminente
Localized Italian override for pre-deadline threshold title.

Sample **{preDeadlineThresholdEmphasisOpen}Your Mac reaches the macOS {ddmVersionString} enforcement deadline in {minutesBeforeDeadline} minutes.{preDeadlineThresholdEmphasisClose}**

Greetings, {loggedInUserFirstname}!

{preDeadlineThresholdEmphasisOpen}Please {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} to macOS {ddmVersionString} now to avoid the automatic enforcement action at {ddmVersionStringDeadlineHumanReadable}.{preDeadlineThresholdEmphasisClose}{updateReadyMessage}

To perform the {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} now, click **{button1text}**, review the on-screen instructions, then click **{softwareUpdateButtonText}**.{excessiveUptimeWarningMessage}{diskSpaceWarningMessage}{supportAssistanceMessage}
Markdown-formatted message displayed for a configured final-minute pre-deadline reminder.

Sample **{preDeadlineThresholdEmphasisOpen}Your Mac reaches the macOS {ddmVersionString} enforcement deadline in {minutesBeforeDeadline} minutes.{preDeadlineThresholdEmphasisClose}**

Greetings, {loggedInUserFirstname}!

{preDeadlineThresholdEmphasisOpen}Please {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} to macOS {ddmVersionString} now to avoid the automatic enforcement action at {ddmVersionStringDeadlineHumanReadable}.{preDeadlineThresholdEmphasisClose}{updateReadyMessage}

To perform the {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} now, click **{button1text}**, review the on-screen instructions, then click **{softwareUpdateButtonText}**.{excessiveUptimeWarningMessage}{diskSpaceWarningMessage}{supportAssistanceMessage}
Localized English override for pre-deadline threshold message.

Sample {preDeadlineThresholdEmphasisOpen}Dieser Mac erreicht die Frist für macOS {ddmVersionString} in {minutesBeforeDeadline} Minuten.{preDeadlineThresholdEmphasisClose}

Hallo {loggedInUserFirstname}!

{preDeadlineThresholdEmphasisOpen}Bitte installiere macOS {ddmVersionString} jetzt, damit die automatische Durchsetzung um {ddmVersionStringDeadlineHumanReadable} vermieden wird.{preDeadlineThresholdEmphasisClose}{updateReadyMessage}

Klicke zum Starten auf **{button1text}**, folge den Hinweisen auf dem Bildschirm und klicke anschließend auf **{softwareUpdateButtonText}**.{excessiveUptimeWarningMessage}{diskSpaceWarningMessage}{supportAssistanceMessage}
Localized German override for pre-deadline threshold message.

Sample {preDeadlineThresholdEmphasisOpen}Votre Mac atteint l'échéance d'application de macOS {ddmVersionString} dans {minutesBeforeDeadline} minutes.{preDeadlineThresholdEmphasisClose}

Bonjour {loggedInUserFirstname}!

{preDeadlineThresholdEmphasisOpen}Veuillez effectuer la {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} vers macOS {ddmVersionString} maintenant afin d'éviter l'action automatique prévue à {ddmVersionStringDeadlineHumanReadable}.{preDeadlineThresholdEmphasisClose}{updateReadyMessage}

Pour effectuer la {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} maintenant, cliquez sur **{button1text}**, suivez les instructions à l'écran, puis cliquez sur **{softwareUpdateButtonText}**.{excessiveUptimeWarningMessage}{diskSpaceWarningMessage}{supportAssistanceMessage}
Localized French override for pre-deadline threshold message.

Sample {preDeadlineThresholdEmphasisOpen}Su Mac alcanza la fecha límite de aplicación de macOS {ddmVersionString} en {minutesBeforeDeadline} minutos.{preDeadlineThresholdEmphasisClose}

Hola {loggedInUserFirstname}.

{preDeadlineThresholdEmphasisOpen}Aplique la {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} a macOS {ddmVersionString} ahora para evitar la acción automática prevista a las {ddmVersionStringDeadlineHumanReadable}.{preDeadlineThresholdEmphasisClose}{updateReadyMessage}

Para realizar la {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} ahora, haga clic en **{button1text}**, revise las instrucciones en pantalla y luego haga clic en **{softwareUpdateButtonText}**.{excessiveUptimeWarningMessage}{diskSpaceWarningMessage}{supportAssistanceMessage}
Localized Spanish override for pre-deadline threshold message.

Sample {preDeadlineThresholdEmphasisOpen}O seu Mac atinge o prazo de aplicação do macOS {ddmVersionString} em {minutesBeforeDeadline} minutos.{preDeadlineThresholdEmphasisClose}

Ola {loggedInUserFirstname}.

{preDeadlineThresholdEmphasisOpen}Aplique a {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} para o macOS {ddmVersionString} agora para evitar a ação automática prevista para {ddmVersionStringDeadlineHumanReadable}.{preDeadlineThresholdEmphasisClose}{updateReadyMessage}

Para efetuar a {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} agora, clique em **{button1text}**, reveja as instruções no ecrã e clique em **{softwareUpdateButtonText}**.{excessiveUptimeWarningMessage}{diskSpaceWarningMessage}{supportAssistanceMessage}
Localized Portuguese override for pre-deadline threshold message.

Sample {preDeadlineThresholdEmphasisOpen}このMacは {minutesBeforeDeadline} 分後に macOS {ddmVersionString} の適用期限に到達します。{preDeadlineThresholdEmphasisClose}

{loggedInUserFirstname}さん、{weekday}もお疲れさまです。

{preDeadlineThresholdEmphasisOpen}{ddmVersionStringDeadlineHumanReadable} の自動適用を避けるため、今すぐ macOS {ddmVersionString} への {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} を実行してください。{preDeadlineThresholdEmphasisClose}{updateReadyMessage}

今すぐ実行するには **{button1text}** をクリックし、画面の指示を確認してから **{softwareUpdateButtonText}** をクリックしてください。{excessiveUptimeWarningMessage}{diskSpaceWarningMessage}{supportAssistanceMessage}
Localized Japanese override for pre-deadline threshold message.

Sample {preDeadlineThresholdEmphasisOpen}Uw Mac bereikt de afdwingdeadline voor macOS {ddmVersionString} over {minutesBeforeDeadline} minuten.{preDeadlineThresholdEmphasisClose}

Hallo {loggedInUserFirstname}!

{preDeadlineThresholdEmphasisOpen}Voer de {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} naar macOS {ddmVersionString} nu uit om de automatische afdwingactie om {ddmVersionStringDeadlineHumanReadable} te voorkomen.{preDeadlineThresholdEmphasisClose}{updateReadyMessage}

Klik op **{button1text}** om de {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} nu uit te voeren, volg de instructies op het scherm en klik daarna op **{softwareUpdateButtonText}**.{excessiveUptimeWarningMessage}{diskSpaceWarningMessage}{supportAssistanceMessage}
Localized Dutch override for pre-deadline threshold message.

Sample {preDeadlineThresholdEmphasisOpen}Il tuo Mac raggiungerà la scadenza di applicazione di macOS {ddmVersionString} tra {minutesBeforeDeadline} minuti.{preDeadlineThresholdEmphasisClose}

Buon {weekday}, {loggedInUserFirstname}!

{preDeadlineThresholdEmphasisOpen}Esegui ora l'{titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} a macOS {ddmVersionString} per evitare l'azione automatica prevista alle {ddmVersionStringDeadlineHumanReadable}.{preDeadlineThresholdEmphasisClose}{updateReadyMessage}

Per eseguire ora l'{titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower}, fai clic su **{button1text}**, segui le istruzioni sullo schermo, quindi fai clic su **{softwareUpdateButtonText}**.{excessiveUptimeWarningMessage}{diskSpaceWarningMessage}{supportAssistanceMessage}
Localized Italian override for pre-deadline threshold message.
Title shown when past-deadline restart behavior is Prompt.
Localized title shown when past-deadline restart behavior is prompt. for English.
Localized title shown when past-deadline restart behavior is prompt. for German.
Localized title shown when past-deadline restart behavior is prompt. for French.
Localized title shown when past-deadline restart behavior is prompt. for Spanish.
Localized title shown when past-deadline restart behavior is prompt. for Portuguese.
Macを再起動してください
Localized title shown when past-deadline restart behavior is prompt. for Japanese.
Localized title shown when past-deadline restart behavior is prompt. for Dutch.
Localized title shown when past-deadline restart behavior is prompt. for Italian.

**Please restart your Mac now**

Happy {weekday}, {loggedInUserFirstname}!

Your Mac is past the **{ddmVersionStringDeadlineHumanReadable}** deadline to {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} to macOS {ddmVersionString}.

Click **{button1text}** to restart now to help complete the required {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower}.

(This reminder will persist until your Mac has been restarted.)
Message shown when past-deadline restart behavior is Prompt.

**Please restart your Mac now**

Happy {weekday}, {loggedInUserFirstname}!

Your Mac is past the **{ddmVersionStringDeadlineHumanReadable}** deadline to {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} to macOS {ddmVersionString}.

Click **{button1text}** to restart now to help complete the required {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower}.

(This reminder will persist until your Mac has been restarted.)
Localized message shown when past-deadline restart behavior is prompt. for English.

**Bitte starte deinen Mac jetzt neu**

Hallo {loggedInUserFirstname}!

Dein Mac hat die Frist **{ddmVersionStringDeadlineHumanReadable}** für die Installation von macOS {ddmVersionString} überschritten.

Klicke auf **{button1text}**, um den Neustart jetzt durchzuführen und die erforderliche Installation abzuschließen.

(Diese Erinnerung bleibt sichtbar, bis dein Mac neu gestartet wurde.)
Localized message shown when past-deadline restart behavior is prompt. for German.

**Veuillez redémarrer votre Mac maintenant**

Bonjour {loggedInUserFirstname}!

Votre Mac a dépassé l'échéance **{ddmVersionStringDeadlineHumanReadable}** pour la {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} vers macOS {ddmVersionString}.

Cliquez sur **{button1text}** pour redémarrer maintenant et terminer la {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} requise.

(Ce rappel restera affiché jusqu'au redémarrage de votre Mac.)
Localized message shown when past-deadline restart behavior is prompt. for French.

**Reinicie su Mac ahora**

Hola {loggedInUserFirstname}.

Su Mac ha superado la fecha límite de **{ddmVersionStringDeadlineHumanReadable}** para aplicar la {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} a macOS {ddmVersionString}.

Haga clic en **{button1text}** para reiniciar ahora y ayudar a completar la {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} requerida.

(Este recordatorio permanecerá visible hasta que se reinicie su Mac.)
Localized message shown when past-deadline restart behavior is prompt. for Spanish.

**Reinicie o seu Mac agora**

Ola {loggedInUserFirstname}.

O seu Mac ultrapassou o prazo de **{ddmVersionStringDeadlineHumanReadable}** para aplicar a {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} para o macOS {ddmVersionString}.

Clique em **{button1text}** para reiniciar agora e ajudar a concluir a {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} obrigatória.

(Este lembrete permanecerá visível até o seu Mac ser reiniciado.)
Localized message shown when past-deadline restart behavior is prompt. for Portuguese.

**今すぐMacを再起動してください**

{loggedInUserFirstname}さん、{weekday}もお疲れさまです。

このMacは、macOS {ddmVersionString} への {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} の期限 **{ddmVersionStringDeadlineHumanReadable}** を過ぎています。

必須の {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} を完了するため、**{button1text}** をクリックして今すぐ再起動してください。

（この通知はMacが再起動されるまで表示されます。）
Localized message shown when past-deadline restart behavior is prompt. for Japanese.

**Start uw Mac nu opnieuw op**

Hallo {loggedInUserFirstname}!

Uw Mac heeft de deadline van **{ddmVersionStringDeadlineHumanReadable}** overschreden om de {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} naar macOS **{ddmVersionString}** uit te voeren.

Klik op **{button1text}** om nu opnieuw op te starten en de vereiste {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} te helpen voltooien.

(Deze herinnering blijft zichtbaar totdat uw Mac opnieuw is opgestart.)
Localized message shown when past-deadline restart behavior is prompt. for Dutch.

**Riavvia subito il tuo Mac**

Buon {weekday}, {loggedInUserFirstname}!

Il tuo Mac ha superato la scadenza del **{ddmVersionStringDeadlineHumanReadable}** per eseguire l'{titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} a macOS {ddmVersionString}.

Fai clic su **{button1text}** per riavviare ora e completare l'{titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} richiesto.

(Questo promemoria rimarrà visibile fino al riavvio del Mac.)
Localized message shown when past-deadline restart behavior is prompt. for Italian.
Title shown when past-deadline restart behavior is Force.
Localized title shown when past-deadline restart behavior is force. for English.
Localized title shown when past-deadline restart behavior is force. for German.
Localized title shown when past-deadline restart behavior is force. for French.
Localized title shown when past-deadline restart behavior is force. for Spanish.
O seu Mac está a reiniciar
Localized title shown when past-deadline restart behavior is force. for Portuguese.
Localized title shown when past-deadline restart behavior is force. for Japanese.
Localized title shown when past-deadline restart behavior is force. for Dutch.
Il tuo Mac si sta riavviando
Localized title shown when past-deadline restart behavior is force. for Italian.

**Your Mac will restart when the timer below expires.**

Happy {weekday}, {loggedInUserFirstname}!

Your Mac is past the **{ddmVersionStringDeadlineHumanReadable}** deadline to install macOS {ddmVersionString} and needs to be restarted to help the {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} process to complete, or you can click **{button1text}**.

(This reminder will persist until your Mac has been restarted.)
Message shown when past-deadline restart behavior is Force.

**Your Mac will restart when the timer below expires.**

Happy {weekday}, {loggedInUserFirstname}!

Your Mac is past the **{ddmVersionStringDeadlineHumanReadable}** deadline to install macOS {ddmVersionString} and needs to be restarted to help the {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} process to complete, or you can click **{button1text}**.

(This reminder will persist until your Mac has been restarted.)
Localized message shown when past-deadline restart behavior is force. for English.

**Dein Mac wird neu gestartet, wenn der Timer unten abläuft.**

Hallo {loggedInUserFirstname}!

Die Frist **{ddmVersionStringDeadlineHumanReadable}** für macOS {ddmVersionString} wurde überschritten. Ein Neustart ist erforderlich, um die Installation abzuschließen. Du kannst auch auf **{button1text}** klicken.

(Diese Erinnerung bleibt sichtbar, bis dein Mac neu gestartet wurde.)
Localized message shown when past-deadline restart behavior is force. for German.

**Votre Mac redémarrera lorsque le minuteur ci-dessous expirera.**

Bonjour {loggedInUserFirstname}!

Votre Mac a dépassé l'échéance **{ddmVersionStringDeadlineHumanReadable}** pour macOS {ddmVersionString}. Un redémarrage est requis pour terminer la {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} ; vous pouvez aussi cliquer sur **{button1text}**.

(Ce rappel restera affiché jusqu'au redémarrage de votre Mac.)
Localized message shown when past-deadline restart behavior is force. for French.

**Su Mac se reiniciará cuando expire el temporizador de abajo.**

Hola {loggedInUserFirstname}.

Su Mac ha superado la fecha límite de **{ddmVersionStringDeadlineHumanReadable}** para instalar macOS {ddmVersionString} y debe reiniciarse para ayudar a completar la {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower}, o bien puede hacer clic en **{button1text}**.

(Este recordatorio permanecerá visible hasta que se reinicie su Mac.)
Localized message shown when past-deadline restart behavior is force. for Spanish.

**O seu Mac será reiniciado quando o temporizador abaixo terminar.**

Ola {loggedInUserFirstname}.

O seu Mac ultrapassou o prazo de **{ddmVersionStringDeadlineHumanReadable}** para instalar o macOS {ddmVersionString} e precisa de ser reiniciado para ajudar a concluir a {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower}, ou pode clicar em **{button1text}**.

(Este lembrete permanecerá visível até o seu Mac ser reiniciado.)
Localized message shown when past-deadline restart behavior is force. for Portuguese.

**下のタイマーが切れるとMacが再起動します。**

{loggedInUserFirstname}さん、{weekday}もお疲れさまです。

このMacは、macOS {ddmVersionString} のインストール期限 **{ddmVersionStringDeadlineHumanReadable}** を過ぎています。{titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} を完了しやすくするため再起動が必要です。すぐに実行するには **{button1text}** をクリックしてください。

（この通知はMacが再起動されるまで表示されます。）
Localized message shown when past-deadline restart behavior is force. for Japanese.

**Uw Mac wordt opnieuw opgestart wanneer de timer hieronder afloopt.**

Hallo {loggedInUserFirstname}!

Uw Mac heeft de deadline van **{ddmVersionStringDeadlineHumanReadable}** overschreden om macOS {ddmVersionString} te installeren en moet opnieuw worden opgestart om het {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower}-proces te helpen voltooien, of u kunt op **{button1text}** klikken.

(Deze herinnering blijft zichtbaar totdat uw Mac opnieuw is opgestart.)
Localized message shown when past-deadline restart behavior is force. for Dutch.

**Il tuo Mac si riavvierà allo scadere del timer sottostante.**

Buon {weekday}, {loggedInUserFirstname}!

Il tuo Mac ha superato la scadenza del **{ddmVersionStringDeadlineHumanReadable}** per installare macOS {ddmVersionString} e deve essere riavviato per completare il processo di {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower}, oppure puoi fare clic su **{button1text}**.

(Questo promemoria rimarrà visibile fino al riavvio del Mac.)
Localized message shown when past-deadline restart behavior is force. for Italian.
Title displayed while aggressive past-deadline reminder mode is active.
Localized English override for aggressive mode title.
Localized German override for aggressive mode title.
Localized French override for aggressive mode title.
Localized Spanish override for aggressive mode title.
Localized Portuguese override for aggressive mode title.
Localized Japanese override for aggressive mode title.
Localized Dutch override for aggressive mode title.
Localized Italian override for aggressive mode title.

**Your Mac is past its required macOS {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} deadline.**

Happy {weekday}, {loggedInUserFirstname}!

Your Mac has been past the **{ddmVersionStringDeadlineHumanReadable}** deadline for **{aggressiveModeHoursPastDeadline} hour(s)** and still needs macOS {ddmVersionString}.

Click **{button1text}**, review the on-screen instructions, then click **{softwareUpdateButtonText}**. This reminder will return about every {aggressiveModeFrequencyMinutes} minutes until macOS {ddmVersionString} is installed.{updateReadyMessage}{excessiveUptimeWarningMessage}{diskSpaceWarningMessage}{supportAssistanceMessage}
Markdown-formatted message displayed while aggressive past-deadline reminder mode is active.

**Your Mac is past its required macOS {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} deadline.**

Happy {weekday}, {loggedInUserFirstname}!

Your Mac has been past the **{ddmVersionStringDeadlineHumanReadable}** deadline for **{aggressiveModeHoursPastDeadline} hour(s)** and still needs macOS {ddmVersionString}.

Click **{button1text}**, review the on-screen instructions, then click **{softwareUpdateButtonText}**. This reminder will return about every {aggressiveModeFrequencyMinutes} minutes until macOS {ddmVersionString} is installed.{updateReadyMessage}{excessiveUptimeWarningMessage}{diskSpaceWarningMessage}{supportAssistanceMessage}
Localized English override for aggressive mode message.

**Dein Mac hat die erforderliche macOS-{titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower}-Frist überschritten.**

Hallo {loggedInUserFirstname}!

Die Frist **{ddmVersionStringDeadlineHumanReadable}** ist seit **{aggressiveModeHoursPastDeadline} Stunde(n)** überschritten, und dieser Mac benötigt weiterhin macOS {ddmVersionString}.

Klicke auf **{button1text}**, folge den Hinweisen auf dem Bildschirm und klicke anschließend auf **{softwareUpdateButtonText}**. Diese Erinnerung erscheint etwa alle {aggressiveModeFrequencyMinutes} Minuten, bis macOS {ddmVersionString} installiert ist.{updateReadyMessage}{excessiveUptimeWarningMessage}{diskSpaceWarningMessage}{supportAssistanceMessage}
Localized German override for aggressive mode message.

**Votre Mac a dépassé l'échéance requise de {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} macOS.**

Bonjour {loggedInUserFirstname}!

Votre Mac a dépassé l'échéance **{ddmVersionStringDeadlineHumanReadable}** depuis **{aggressiveModeHoursPastDeadline} heure(s)** et nécessite toujours macOS {ddmVersionString}.

Cliquez sur **{button1text}**, suivez les instructions à l'écran, puis cliquez sur **{softwareUpdateButtonText}**. Ce rappel reviendra environ toutes les {aggressiveModeFrequencyMinutes} minutes jusqu'à l'installation de macOS {ddmVersionString}.{updateReadyMessage}{excessiveUptimeWarningMessage}{diskSpaceWarningMessage}{supportAssistanceMessage}
Localized French override for aggressive mode message.

**Su Mac ha superado la fecha límite obligatoria de {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} de macOS.**

Hola {loggedInUserFirstname}.

Su Mac ha superado la fecha límite de **{ddmVersionStringDeadlineHumanReadable}** por **{aggressiveModeHoursPastDeadline} hora(s)** y aún necesita macOS {ddmVersionString}.

Haga clic en **{button1text}**, revise las instrucciones en pantalla y luego haga clic en **{softwareUpdateButtonText}**. Este recordatorio volverá aproximadamente cada {aggressiveModeFrequencyMinutes} minutos hasta que macOS {ddmVersionString} esté instalado.{updateReadyMessage}{excessiveUptimeWarningMessage}{diskSpaceWarningMessage}{supportAssistanceMessage}
Localized Spanish override for aggressive mode message.

**O seu Mac ultrapassou o prazo obrigatório da {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} do macOS.**

Ola {loggedInUserFirstname}.

O seu Mac ultrapassou o prazo de **{ddmVersionStringDeadlineHumanReadable}** há **{aggressiveModeHoursPastDeadline} hora(s)** e ainda precisa do macOS {ddmVersionString}.

Clique em **{button1text}**, reveja as instruções no ecrã e clique em **{softwareUpdateButtonText}**. Este lembrete voltará aproximadamente a cada {aggressiveModeFrequencyMinutes} minutos até o macOS {ddmVersionString} estar instalado.{updateReadyMessage}{excessiveUptimeWarningMessage}{diskSpaceWarningMessage}{supportAssistanceMessage}
Localized Portuguese override for aggressive mode message.

**このMacは必須のmacOS {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower}期限を過ぎています。**

{loggedInUserFirstname}さん、{weekday}もお疲れさまです。

期限 **{ddmVersionStringDeadlineHumanReadable}** から **{aggressiveModeHoursPastDeadline} 時間** が経過しており、まだ macOS {ddmVersionString} が必要です。

**{button1text}** をクリックし、画面の案内を確認したあと **{softwareUpdateButtonText}** をクリックしてください。macOS {ddmVersionString} がインストールされるまで、このリマインダーは約 {aggressiveModeFrequencyMinutes} 分ごとに戻ります。{updateReadyMessage}{excessiveUptimeWarningMessage}{diskSpaceWarningMessage}{supportAssistanceMessage}
Localized Japanese override for aggressive mode message.

**Uw Mac is voorbij de vereiste macOS {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower}-deadline.**

Hallo {loggedInUserFirstname}!

Uw Mac is al **{aggressiveModeHoursPastDeadline} uur** voorbij de deadline **{ddmVersionStringDeadlineHumanReadable}** en heeft nog steeds macOS {ddmVersionString} nodig.

Klik op **{button1text}**, volg de instructies op het scherm en klik daarna op **{softwareUpdateButtonText}**. Deze herinnering komt ongeveer elke {aggressiveModeFrequencyMinutes} minuten terug totdat macOS {ddmVersionString} is geïnstalleerd.{updateReadyMessage}{excessiveUptimeWarningMessage}{diskSpaceWarningMessage}{supportAssistanceMessage}
Localized Dutch override for aggressive mode message.

**Il tuo Mac ha superato la scadenza obbligatoria per l'{titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} di macOS.**

Buon {weekday}, {loggedInUserFirstname}!

Il tuo Mac ha superato la scadenza **{ddmVersionStringDeadlineHumanReadable}** da **{aggressiveModeHoursPastDeadline} ora/e** e richiede ancora macOS {ddmVersionString}.

Fai clic su **{button1text}**, segui le istruzioni sullo schermo, quindi fai clic su **{softwareUpdateButtonText}**. Questo promemoria tornerà circa ogni {aggressiveModeFrequencyMinutes} minuti finché macOS {ddmVersionString} non sarà installato.{updateReadyMessage}{excessiveUptimeWarningMessage}{diskSpaceWarningMessage}{supportAssistanceMessage}
Localized Italian override for aggressive mode message.

Sample **A required macOS {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} is now available**

Greetings, {loggedInUserFirstname}!

Please {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} to macOS **{ddmVersionString}** to ensure your Mac remains secure and compliant with organizational policies.{updateReadyMessage}

To perform the {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} now, click **{button1text}**, review the on-screen instructions, then click **{softwareUpdateButtonText}**.

If you are unable to perform this {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} now, click **{button2text}** to be reminded again later (which is disabled when the deadline is imminent).

{deadlineEnforcementMessage}{excessiveUptimeWarningMessage}{diskSpaceWarningMessage}{supportAssistanceMessage}
Markdown-formatted message body displayed in the dialog.

Sample **A required macOS {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} is now available**

Greetings, {loggedInUserFirstname}!

Please {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} to macOS **{ddmVersionString}** to ensure your Mac remains secure and compliant with organizational policies.{updateReadyMessage}

To perform the {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} now, click **{button1text}**, review the on-screen instructions, then click **{softwareUpdateButtonText}**.

If you are unable to perform this {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} now, click **{button2text}** to be reminded again later (which is disabled when the deadline is imminent).

{deadlineEnforcementMessage}{excessiveUptimeWarningMessage}{diskSpaceWarningMessage}{supportAssistanceMessage}
Localized markdown-formatted message body displayed in the dialog. for English.

Sample **Ein erforderliches macOS-{titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade} ist jetzt verfügbar**

Hallo {loggedInUserFirstname}!

Bitte installiere macOS **{ddmVersionString}**, damit dein Mac sicher bleibt und den Richtlinien entspricht.{updateReadyMessage}

Um jetzt zu beginnen, klicke auf **{button1text}**, folge den Hinweisen auf dem Bildschirm und klicke anschließend auf **{softwareUpdateButtonText}**.

Wenn du das jetzt nicht durchführen kannst, klicke auf **{button2text}**, um später erinnert zu werden (diese Option ist kurz vor der Frist deaktiviert).

{deadlineEnforcementMessage}{excessiveUptimeWarningMessage}{diskSpaceWarningMessage}{supportAssistanceMessage}
Localized markdown-formatted message body displayed in the dialog. for German.

Sample **Une {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} macOS requise est maintenant disponible**

Bonjour, {loggedInUserFirstname}!

Veuillez effectuer la {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} vers macOS **{ddmVersionString}** afin de maintenir la sécurité et la conformité de votre Mac aux politiques de votre organisation.{updateReadyMessage}

Pour effectuer la {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} maintenant, cliquez sur **{button1text}**, suivez les instructions à l'écran, puis cliquez sur **{softwareUpdateButtonText}**.

Si vous ne pouvez pas effectuer cette {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} maintenant, cliquez sur **{button2text}** pour recevoir un nouveau rappel plus tard (ce bouton est désactivé lorsque l'échéance est imminente).

{deadlineEnforcementMessage}{excessiveUptimeWarningMessage}{diskSpaceWarningMessage}{supportAssistanceMessage}
Localized markdown-formatted message body displayed in the dialog. for French.

Sample **Ya está disponible una {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} obligatoria de macOS**

¡Feliz {weekday}, {loggedInUserFirstname}!

Realice la {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} a macOS **{ddmVersionString}** para mantener su Mac seguro y en cumplimiento con las políticas de la organización.{updateReadyMessage}

Para realizar la {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} ahora, haga clic en **{button1text}**, revise las instrucciones en pantalla y luego haga clic en **{softwareUpdateButtonText}**.

Si no puede realizar esta {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} ahora, haga clic en **{button2text}** para recibir otro recordatorio más tarde (esta opción se desactiva cuando se acerca la fecha límite).

{deadlineEnforcementMessage}{excessiveUptimeWarningMessage}{diskSpaceWarningMessage}{supportAssistanceMessage}
Localized markdown-formatted message body displayed in the dialog. for Spanish.

Sample **Já está disponível uma {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} obrigatória do macOS**

Feliz {weekday}, {loggedInUserFirstname}!

Efetue a {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} para o macOS **{ddmVersionString}** para manter o seu Mac seguro e em conformidade com as políticas da organização.{updateReadyMessage}

Para efetuar a {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} agora, clique em **{button1text}**, siga as instruções no ecrã e depois clique em **{softwareUpdateButtonText}**.

Se não puder efetuar esta {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} agora, clique em **{button2text}** para receber outro lembrete mais tarde (esta opção fica desativada quando o prazo se aproxima).

{deadlineEnforcementMessage}{excessiveUptimeWarningMessage}{diskSpaceWarningMessage}{supportAssistanceMessage}
Localized markdown-formatted message body displayed in the dialog. for Portuguese.

Sample **必須のmacOS {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} を利用できます**

{loggedInUserFirstname}さん、{weekday}もお疲れさまです。

Macを安全に保ち、組織のポリシーに準拠するため、macOS **{ddmVersionString}** へ {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} してください。{updateReadyMessage}

今すぐ {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} するには、**{button1text}** をクリックし、画面の案内を確認したあと **{softwareUpdateButtonText}** をクリックしてください。

今すぐ実行できない場合は、**{button2text}** をクリックして後で再通知を受けてください（期限が近づくとこのオプションは無効になります）。

{deadlineEnforcementMessage}{excessiveUptimeWarningMessage}{diskSpaceWarningMessage}{supportAssistanceMessage}
Localized markdown-formatted message body displayed in the dialog. for Japanese.

Sample **Een vereiste macOS {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} is nu beschikbaar**

Hallo, {loggedInUserFirstname}!

Voer de macOS {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} naar macOS **{ddmVersionString}** uit om ervoor te zorgen dat uw Mac veilig blijft en voldoet aan de beleidsregels van de organisatie.{updateReadyMessage}

Om de {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} nu uit te voeren, klikt u op **{button1text}**, volgt u de instructies op het scherm en klikt u vervolgens op **{softwareUpdateButtonText}**.

Als u deze {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} nu niet kunt uitvoeren, klikt u op **{button2text}** om later opnieuw te worden herinnerd (deze optie is niet beschikbaar wanneer de deadline nadert).

{deadlineEnforcementMessage}{excessiveUptimeWarningMessage}{diskSpaceWarningMessage}{supportAssistanceMessage}
Localized markdown-formatted message body displayed in the dialog. for Dutch.

Sample **È ora disponibile un {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} obbligatorio di macOS**

Salve, {loggedInUserFirstname}!

Esegui l'{titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} a macOS **{ddmVersionString}** per garantire che il tuo Mac rimanga sicuro e conforme alle politiche organizzative.{updateReadyMessage}

Per eseguire l'{titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} ora, fai clic su **{button1text}**, segui le istruzioni sullo schermo, quindi fai clic su **{softwareUpdateButtonText}**.

Se non puoi eseguire l'{titleMessageUpdateOrUpgradeLower} ora, fai clic su **{button2text}** per ricevere un promemoria in seguito (disabilitato quando la scadenza è imminente).

{deadlineEnforcementMessage}{excessiveUptimeWarningMessage}{diskSpaceWarningMessage}{supportAssistanceMessage}
Localized markdown-formatted message body displayed in the dialog. for Italian.
Markdown-formatted info box content showing current and required versions and deadline.

Sample

For assistance, please contact: **{supportTeamName}**
- **Telephone:** {supportTeamPhone}
- **Email:** {supportTeamEmail}
- **Website:** {supportTeamWebsite}
- **Knowledge Base Article:** {supportKBURL}

**User Information:**
- **Full Name:** {userfullname}
- **User Name:** {username}

**Computer Information:**
- **Computer Name:** {computername}
- **Serial Number:** {serialnumber}
- **macOS:** {osversion}

**Script Information:**
- **Dialog:** {dialogVersion}
- **Script:** {scriptVersion}
Markdown-formatted help text including support, user, and computer information.

Sample

For assistance, please contact: **{supportTeamName}**
- **Telephone:** {supportTeamPhone}
- **Email:** {supportTeamEmail}
- **Website:** {supportTeamWebsite}
- **Knowledge Base Article:** {supportKBURL}

**User Information:**
- **Full Name:** {userfullname}
- **User Name:** {username}

**Computer Information:**
- **Computer Name:** {computername}
- **Serial Number:** {serialnumber}
- **macOS:** {osversion}

**Script Information:**
- **Dialog:** {dialogVersion}
- **Script:** {scriptVersion}

Sample

Pour obtenir de l'aide, veuillez contacter : **{supportTeamName}**
- **Téléphone :** {supportTeamPhone}
- **E-mail :** {supportTeamEmail}
- **Site web :** {supportTeamWebsite}
- **Article de la base de connaissances :** {supportKBURL}

**Informations utilisateur :**
- **Nom complet :** {userfullname}
- **Nom d'utilisateur :** {username}

**Informations de l'ordinateur :**
- **Nom de l'ordinateur :** {computername}
- **Numéro de série :** {serialnumber}
- **macOS :** {osversion}

**Informations du script :**
- **Dialog :** {dialogVersion}
- **Script :** {scriptVersion}

Sample

Para obtener ayuda, contacte con: **{supportTeamName}**
- **Teléfono:** {supportTeamPhone}
- **Correo electrónico:** {supportTeamEmail}
- **Sitio web:** {supportTeamWebsite}
- **Artículo de la base de conocimiento:** {supportKBURL}

**Información del usuario:**
- **Nombre completo:** {userfullname}
- **Nombre de usuario:** {username}

**Información del ordenador:**
- **Nombre del ordenador:** {computername}
- **Número de serie:** {serialnumber}
- **macOS:** {osversion}

**Información del script:**
- **Dialog:** {dialogVersion}
- **Script:** {scriptVersion}

Sample

Para obter assistência, contacte: **{supportTeamName}**
- **Telefone:** {supportTeamPhone}
- **Email:** {supportTeamEmail}
- **Site web:** {supportTeamWebsite}
- **Artigo da base de conhecimento:** {supportKBURL}

**Informações do utilizador:**
- **Nome completo:** {userfullname}
- **Nome de utilizador:** {username}

**Informações do computador:**
- **Nome do computador:** {computername}
- **Número de série:** {serialnumber}
- **macOS:** {osversion}

**Informações do script:**
- **Dialog:** {dialogVersion}
- **Script:** {scriptVersion}

Sample

サポートが必要な場合は次までご連絡ください: **{supportTeamName}**
- **電話:** {supportTeamPhone}
- **メール:** {supportTeamEmail}
- **Webサイト:** {supportTeamWebsite}
- **ナレッジベース記事:** {supportKBURL}

**ユーザー情報:**
- **氏名:** {userfullname}
- **ユーザー名:** {username}

**コンピュータ情報:**
- **コンピュータ名:** {computername}
- **シリアル番号:** {serialnumber}
- **macOS:** {osversion}

**スクリプト情報:**
- **Dialog:** {dialogVersion}
- **Script:** {scriptVersion}

Sample

Voor hulp kunt u contact opnemen met: **{supportTeamName}**
- **Telefoon:** {supportTeamPhone}
- **Email:** {supportTeamEmail}
- **Website:** {supportTeamWebsite}
- **Kennisbankartikel:** {supportKBURL}

**Gebruikersinformatie:**
- **Volledige naam:** {userfullname}
- **Gebruikersnaam:** {username}

**Computerinformatie:**
- **Computernaam:** {computername}
- **Serienummer:** {serialnumber}
- **macOS:** {osversion}

**Scriptinformatie:**
- **Dialog:** {dialogVersion}
- **Script:** {scriptVersion}

Sample

Per assistenza, contatta: **{supportTeamName}**
- **Telefono:** {supportTeamPhone}
- **Email:** {supportTeamEmail}
- **Sito web:** {supportTeamWebsite}
- **Articolo della knowledge base:** {supportKBURL}

**Informazioni utente:**
- **Nome completo:** {userfullname}
- **Nome utente:** {username}

**Informazioni computer:**
- **Nome computer:** {computername}
- **Numero di serie:** {serialnumber}
- **macOS:** {osversion}

**Informazioni script:**
- **Dialog:** {dialogVersion}
- **Script:** {scriptVersion}
Help image configuration, such as QR code pointing to the info button action.
